diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis of KD was made based on the chronic indolent course of the subcutaneous nodules/plaques, their histological findings, and the association with persistent eosinophilia and high serum IgE levels. The diagnosis of MF was made based on the clinical, histological, and immunoperoxidase findings despite the negative molecular findings of T-cell clonality. Follicular center cell lymphoma was ruled out due to the clinical presentation, associated elevated serum IgE and eosinophilia, histological findings of a mixed infiltrate with reactive lymphoid follicles, and absence of clonal B-cell population in the samples.
